creator: zeising@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 208830
v1

All ports have been switched to use USES=xorg-cat, so the old XORG_CAT fallback from bsd.port.mk can be removed.  See attachement from patch.
I've run this locally several times (for all ports that set USES=xorg-cat or XORG_CAT), there is no need for an exp-run, I think.
I hope to get approval to commit.
Thanks!
